projectOverview:
This project will deliver a secure, role-based web portal for internal staff to manage onboarding, approvals, and reporting. The solution will integrate with existing identity and data systems and will include audit logging for compliance.

The initial release focuses on core workflows and reporting. Future enhancements (e.g., advanced analytics) are explicitly excluded from this scope.
objectives: Reduce manual processing time for onboarding and approvals
Provide a single source of truth for workflow status and reporting
Ensure traceable, auditable operations for compliance reviews

inScope.title: User authentication and role-based access
inScope.description: Implement login and authorization for staff roles (e.g., Admin, Reviewer, Viewer) with session management.

inScope.title: Onboarding workflow management
inScope.description: Create, review, approve, and track onboarding requests with status history and assigned owners.

assumptions: Client will provide access to required APIs and test environments within the first week of development.
User roles and permissions matrix will be finalized during discovery.

constraints.description: Initial release must be delivered within 8 weeks.
All user actions must be auditable with immutable logs.

risks.description: Delays in API access could block integration work.
risks.mitigation: Request credentials early and implement stubs/mocks for integration points.
